---
title: "Releases"
toc: false
---

Each archive contains a **designer**, a **setup**, and a **ribbon template** (`.xlsb`).

## Latest

| Branch | Download |
|--------|----------|
| Main (stable) | [OBT-main-latest.zip](https://github.com/epicentre-msf/outbreak-tools/raw/dev/releases/latest/OBT-main-latest.zip){target="_blank"} |

## Previous releases

### Main

| Date | Download |
|------|----------|
| 2026-03-17 | [OBT-main-2026-03-17.zip](https://github.com/epicentre-msf/outbreak-tools/raw/dev/releases/old/OBT-main-2026-03-17.zip){target="_blank"} |
| 2024-10-19 | [OBT-main-2024-10-19.zip](https://github.com/epicentre-msf/outbreak-tools/raw/dev/releases/old/OBT-main-2024-10-19.zip){target="_blank"} |
| 2024-09-26 | [OBT-main-2024-09-26.zip](https://github.com/epicentre-msf/outbreak-tools/raw/dev/releases/old/OBT-main-2024-09-26.zip){target="_blank"} |
| 2024-08-12 | [OBT-main-2024-08-12.zip](https://github.com/epicentre-msf/outbreak-tools/raw/dev/releases/old/OBT-main-2024-08-12.zip){target="_blank"} |
| 2024-08-07 | [OBT-main-2024-08-07.zip](https://github.com/epicentre-msf/outbreak-tools/raw/dev/releases/old/OBT-main-2024-08-07.zip){target="_blank"} |
| 2024-07-04 | [OBT-main-2024-07-04.zip](https://github.com/epicentre-msf/outbreak-tools/raw/dev/releases/old/OBT-main-2024-07-04.zip){target="_blank"} |
| 2024-06-13 | [OBT-main-2024-06-13.zip](https://github.com/epicentre-msf/outbreak-tools/raw/dev/releases/old/OBT-main-2024-06-13.zip){target="_blank"} |
| 2024-04-22 | [OBT-main-2024-04-22.zip](https://github.com/epicentre-msf/outbreak-tools/raw/dev/releases/old/OBT-main-2024-04-22.zip){target="_blank"} |
| 2024-04-09 | [OBT-main-2024-04-09.zip](https://github.com/epicentre-msf/outbreak-tools/raw/dev/releases/old/OBT-main-2024-04-09.zip){target="_blank"} |
| 2024-03-29 | [OBT-main-2024-03-29.zip](https://github.com/epicentre-msf/outbreak-tools/raw/dev/releases/old/OBT-main-2024-03-29.zip){target="_blank"} |

### Dev

| Date | Download |
|------|----------|
| 2025-04-28 | [OBT-dev-2025-04-28.zip](https://github.com/epicentre-msf/outbreak-tools/raw/dev/releases/old/OBT-dev-2025-04-28.zip){target="_blank"} |
| 2024-10-19 | [OBT-dev-2024-10-19.zip](https://github.com/epicentre-msf/outbreak-tools/raw/dev/releases/old/OBT-dev-2024-10-19.zip){target="_blank"} |
| 2024-08-12 | [OBT-dev-2024-08-12.zip](https://github.com/epicentre-msf/outbreak-tools/raw/dev/releases/old/OBT-dev-2024-08-12.zip){target="_blank"} |
| 2024-08-07 | [OBT-dev-2024-08-07.zip](https://github.com/epicentre-msf/outbreak-tools/raw/dev/releases/old/OBT-dev-2024-08-07.zip){target="_blank"} |
| 2024-07-04 | [OBT-dev-2024-07-04.zip](https://github.com/epicentre-msf/outbreak-tools/raw/dev/releases/old/OBT-dev-2024-07-04.zip){target="_blank"} |
| 2024-06-13 | [OBT-dev-2024-06-13.zip](https://github.com/epicentre-msf/outbreak-tools/raw/dev/releases/old/OBT-dev-2024-06-13.zip){target="_blank"} |
| 2024-04-22 | [OBT-dev-2024-04-22.zip](https://github.com/epicentre-msf/outbreak-tools/raw/dev/releases/old/OBT-dev-2024-04-22.zip){target="_blank"} |
| 2024-04-09 | [OBT-dev-2024-04-09.zip](https://github.com/epicentre-msf/outbreak-tools/raw/dev/releases/old/OBT-dev-2024-04-09.zip){target="_blank"} |
